ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the occupation */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group classification for the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "level" TEXT /* Hierarchical level of the occupation */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Minimum educational requirement for the occupation */,
  "required_experience_years" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity metric entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation associated with this metric */,
  "percent_female" REAL /* Percentage of women employed in this occupation */,
  "percent_black" REAL /* Percentage of Black or African American employees */,
  "percent_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian employees */,
  "percent_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic or Latino employees */,
  "percent_other" REAL /* Percentage of employees from other ethnic backgrounds */,
  "percent_other_gender" REAL /* Percentage of employees from other gender identities */,
  "percent_disability" REAL /* Percentage of employees with disabilities */,
  "percent_veteran" REAL /* Percentage of employees who are veterans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the group in the organizational hierarchy */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of employees in the group */,
  "average_performance_rating" REAL /* Average performance rating of employees in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_of_hire" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "date_of_last_promotion" TEXT /* Date of the employee's last promotion */,
  "current_salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Current performance rating of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_statistics" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary statistic entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation associated with this salary statistic */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the occupation */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary for the occupation */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the occupation */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the occupation */,
  "salary_percentile_25" REAL /* 25th percentile salary for the occupation */,
  "salary_percentile_75" REAL /* 75th percentile salary for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_statistics_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation associated with this performance metric */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Average performance rating for the occupation */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of performance reviews */,
  "min_performance_rating" REAL /* Minimum performance rating for the occupation */,
  "max_performance_rating" REAL /* Maximum performance rating for the occupation */,
  "performance_percentile_25" REAL /* 25th percentile performance rating for the occupation */,
  "performance_percentile_75" REAL /* 75th percentile performance rating for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "duration_weeks" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in weeks */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of employees who have participated in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation for the job posting */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department for the job posting */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting was created */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Closing date for applications */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered for the job */,
  "number_of_applicants" INTEGER /* Number of applicants for the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_metrics" (
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment metric entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the metrics */,
  "open_positions" INTEGER /* Number of open positions in the department */,
  "filled_positions" INTEGER /* Number of positions filled in the department */,
  "time_to_fill_days" INTEGER /* Average time to fill positions in days */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of applicants to hires */,
  "cost_per_hire" REAL /* Cost incurred to hire each employee */,
  "source_of_applicants" TEXT /* Primary source of applicants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_metrics_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR Manager, Executive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions granted to this role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the role */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view report, update data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
